artifact.content_preview:
STATEMENT OF WORK
PROJECT: NGIS PHASE 3 — DATA CENTRE CONSOLIDATION
Document Number: SOW-NGIS-P3-2024-001
Version: 2.1
Date: September 15, 2024
Contracting Authority: Shared Services Canada (SSC)
Classification: Protected B

---

1. BACKGROUND AND CONTEXT

Shared Services Canada (SSC) is undertaking the Next-Generation
Infrastructure Strategy (NGIS) Phase 3, which involves the consolidation
of three Government of Canada (GC) data centre facilities into a single
modernized enterprise data centre.

extracted_tasks.text: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure

extracted_tasks.text: Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A

extracted_tasks.text: Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites

extracted_tasks.text: Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A
Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office
D-001: Project Management Plan — Due: October 31, 2024
D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD) — Due: December 15, 2024

extracted_tasks.text: Deliver Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package (D-003)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package — Due: January 31, 2025

extracted_tasks.text: Deliver Migration Runbook (Sites B and C) (D-004)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C) — Due: February 28, 2025
D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan — Due: March 10, 2026
D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live) — Due: April 30, 2026
D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report — Due: May 31, 2026
D-008: Project Closure Report — Due: June 30, 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Decision: Consolidate three facilities into Site A
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: consolidation of three Government of Canada (GC) data centre facilities into a single modernized enterprise data centre

extracted_tasks.text: Decision: Applications will be migrated as-is (lift and shift only)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Applications will be migrated as-is (lift and shift only).
The total approved budget for NGIS Phase 3 is $2,400,000

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Project management, weekly status reports, and risk register maintenance",
    "Steering committee presentations and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and departmental change management programs",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades (NOC monitoring platform)"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "D-001: Project Management Plan",
    "D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD)",
    "D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package",
    "D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)",
    "D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan",
    "D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live)",
    "D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report",
    "D-008: Project Closure Report"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date of June 30, 2026",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act and Official Languages Act",
    "Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope/schedule/budget changes",
    "Classification level: Protected B"
  ]
}
```

in_scope: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure
Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A
Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A
Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A
Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites
Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones
BGP routing table migration and validation
Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A
AD schema extension and forest restructuring
Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing
Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD
Project management, weekly status reports, and risk register maintenance
Steering committee presentations and stakeholder communications
out_of_scope: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)
End-user training and departmental change management programs
Network monitoring tool upgrades (NOC monitoring platform)
deliverables: D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package
D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)
constraints: Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes
Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026
Final project closure date of June 30, 2026
Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management
Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security
Compliance with Privacy Act and Official Languages Act
Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope/schedule/budget changes
